promo.supportingText: Freshly brewed coffee to power up your day.

products.name: Caffe Mocha
products.subtitle: Deep Foam
products.description: A cappuccino is an approximately 150 ml beverage, with espresso coffee and steamed milk foam blended for a balanced and creamy texture.

products.name: Flat White
products.subtitle: Espresso
products.description: Flat white combines rich espresso with velvety microfoam for a smoother taste and a lighter finish.

products.name: Caramel Brew
products.subtitle: Cold Brew
products.description: Cold brewed coffee layered with caramel sweetness and a mellow finish for easy sipping.

products.name: Classic Latte
products.subtitle: Smooth Milk
products.description: A classic latte with silky steamed milk, soft foam and a rounded espresso flavor.
